'''Tam Uliss''' was a squat, muscular [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], living on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> The industrialist supported Ansion's attempt to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], meeting secretly with conspirators in a [[Quadrant H-46]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and an orbiting [[Transport/Legends|transport]] above [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE" /> After the attempt failed, he was killed by [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]], dropped from [[Bror Tower Three]] onto the surface of Coruscant.

{{Char-stub}}
